title: GLM-5.2 + Z-Code (Ultra Mode - Free Tier): FABLE LEVEL PERFORMANCE!
summary: A video guide on configuring GLM-5.2 within Z-Code using KingMode, planning skills, verification workflows, and MCPs to achieve strong coding performance at free tier. writeup: The video walks through configuring GLM-5.2 inside Z Code to reach strong coding performance on the free tier, using KingMode, planning skills, verification workflows, MCPs, and Goal Mode. It centers on an iterative loop of Explore, Plan, Build, Verify, Review, and Patch, paired with test-time compute and structured verification. Concrete recommendations include keeping MCPs minimal and applying negative design constraints for frontend work.
